questionHtml: Outline two adaptations of this cell to its function that are visible in this electron micrograph.
markschemeHtml:
a. microvilli increase the surface area for absorption ✔ Each adaptation needs function stated. Do not accept villi, microvilli is required.

b. many mitochondria produce ATP/energy «for active transport» ✔

c. vesicles resulting from endocytosis ✔

meta.title: Outline two adaptations of this cell to its function that are visible in this electron micrograph.
